properties.areaDesc: Jefferson; Wayne; Edwards; Wabash; Perry; Franklin; Hamilton; White; Jackson; Williamson; Saline; Gallatin; Gibson; Pike; Posey; Vanderburgh; Warrick; Spencer; Union; Henderson; Daviess
properties.headline: Flood Watch issued March 5 at 7:03AM CST until March 5 at 12:00PM CST by NWS Paducah KY
properties.description:
* WHAT...Flash flooding caused by excessive rainfall continues to be
possible.

* WHERE...Portions of southern Illinois, including the following
areas, Edwards, Franklin, Gallatin, Hamilton, Jackson, Jefferson,
Perry IL, Saline, Wabash, Wayne IL, White and Williamson,
southwest Indiana, including the following areas, Gibson, Pike,
Posey, Spencer, Vanderburgh and Warrick, and western Kentucky,
including the following areas, Daviess, Henderson and Union KY.

* WHEN...Until noon CST /1 PM EST/ today.

* IMPACTS...Excessive runoff may result in flooding of rivers,
creeks, streams, and other low-lying and flood-prone locations.
Flooding may occur in poor drainage and urban areas. Low-water
crossings may be flooded.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...
- http://www.weather.gov/safety/flood
properties.instruction:
You should monitor later forecasts and be prepared to take action
should Flash Flood Warnings be issued.

NWSheadline: FLOOD WATCH REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL NOON CST /1 PM EST/ TODAY

title: Current watches, warnings, and advisories for Jackson (ILZ084) IL
